title: Automated API Documentation
scenario: Generate a set of Python docstrings for a simple banking API. The API includes the following endpoints: 'get_account_balance', 'transfer_funds', and 'update_account_info'. The docstrings should follow the Google style guide and include a brief description of each method, its parameters, return types, and any exceptions it may raise.
constraints: Must be written in the Google style guide
Must include a brief description for each method
Must include parameter, return type, and exception information

evaluationCriteria.description: The docstrings adhere to the Google style guide
All methods have a brief description
All methods have return type information
